(a)        the person to be protected; or


(b)        an individual or organisation who has been granted permission by the court to apply under section 28(2)(d) of the 2021 Act.


3.2       An application for a DAPO must be made using Form DA1 and be supported by a witness statement.


3.3       An application for a DAPO made by an organisation must state—


(a)        the nature of the organisation;


(b)        the name and address of the person submitting the application; and


(c)        the position which that person holds in the organisation.


3.4       An application for a DAPO must set out the following information, if known—


(a)        whether the contact details for the applicant or the person to be protected, if that person is not the applicant, are to be kept confidential;


(b)        the opinion of the person to be protected about the making of an order, if that person is not the applicant;


(c)        where the application relates to a property—


(i)         the opinion of any relevant occupant about the making of an order; and


(ii)        details of any mortgagee or landlord of the property; and


(d)        details of—


(i)         the times and location of where P normally works or attends an educational or religious establishment;


(ii)        any other court order or injunction to which P is or was previously subject, including a DAPO made against P; and


(iii)       any application for a court order or injunction in respect of P, including a DAPO, which has been refused by the court.


3.5       Where the contact details for the applicant or the person to be protected, if that person is not the applicant, are to be kept confidential, the applicant must also complete Form C8 (confidential contact details form).


3.6       An application for a DAPO on notice must be served in accordance with paragraph 8.


3.7       This paragraph applies to an application for variation or discharge of a DAPO as it applies to an application for a DAPO on notice, except such an application is to be made using Form DA3.
